deconstruction.context: The Bio Tracking tab is fully built and deployed to the frontend.

lateral_prism.tech_view: Added mock array loops to render DOM elements on the fly for Blood and DNA data. Shifted Supplement tracking into the Bio tab.
lateral_prism.biz_view: The user now has a 'single pane of glass' to view their physiological baseline, moving away from unstructured markdown files.
lateral_prism.risk_view: Need to ensure formatting remains stable if the DNA advice string length increases.

plan: Notify the user that Phase 1 & 2 of the Bio Tracker are complete.
